title: Nutty Light Cozy Korean Salmon Stir-fry
description: A Mediterranean-friendly nutty and light dish featuring smoked salmon in a cozy Korean flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C. Arrange salmon fillets on a baking tray, season with salt and pepper.
To make the sauce: In a small bowl, mix together garlic, olive oil, soy sauce, red pepper flakes, and Korean seasoning (if using).
Bake the salmon for about 12-15 minutes or until it's cooked through. Let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Meanwhile, in a wok or large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add scallions and peanuts; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add cherry tomatoes and remaining sauce to the skillet. Stir everything together until just heated through, about 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot with garnished sesame seeds if desired.
